MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Donald J. Sullivan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Sonia Wong #11288

Steven Miyake, Esq. and Richard Collier, Esq. for plaintiff(s) Linda Trechter, Temporary Trustee of the Mary Christine Bertolozzi Revocable Living Trust.
Order waiving witness appearance at default prove-up hearing was granting in court today.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff(s), and against the Defaulted Defendant(s) for quiet title judgment against defendant Jean-Paul Esguerra and Albert Heinecke, and both as Trustee of the Noe Valley Home Trust

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.
